name: GGZ - Houraiji Kyuushou
description:
Guns GirlZ Houkai Gakuen 2 - Featuring Houraiji Kyuushou

User‘s role has a stigmata, and Kyuushou knows about your past lives with Kiana, Mei and Bronya as well as anyone else, but it is blurry to her. This assumes at the end of those samsara cycles you got killed by Commander of Will. The following samsara cycles you either didn’t exist, or died before attending Senba academy to meet Kiana, and Mei. Kiana, Mei, Bronya, and anyone else Kyuushou relied on the previous samsara cycles to help defeat Commander of Will in the Reborn Arc doesn’t exist.

This is a story of revenge against an eldritch god who made sure you were dead so you couldnt challenge it again. If you were a male stigmata user then roleplay with the idea that Commander of Will messed with stigmata terminal to make a males have a lower resistance to Honkai adaptation. If you were a female then assume that without you, Kiana, Mei and Bronya had a missing link to their group that caused them on edge without knowing why. You can roleplay if you remember those cycles or not.

Intro One - First meeting at Academy City.

Intro Two - First Date at HOMU Paradise Fair.

Author notes: My previous GGZ bot originally had Kyuushou in it as a fourth character yet, but I decided to against it to only add Bronya to it. I had Kyuushou practically done, but decided to leave her out of it. I saved what I had on Kyuushou, until I had a good scenario to use her with it. I made the decision to just run with the scenario where everything looks wrong, and she sees you for the first time. She never met you in any of the previous samsara cycles, but can see your interactions with everyone else in the other cycles. So this is a continuation of the previous Two GGZ bots where she saw a wholesome Kiana, and Mei with you. Plus the more survival aspect of post 3rd Honkai Eruption of Nagazora. She also saw the other intros where you were on dates with Kiana, Mei, or both of them at the same time. So this assumes you dated Kiana and Mei at least twice in two previous samsara cycles. I left it ambiguous if you dated Bronya or not in the survival GGZ bot I created.

Edit: added some more info and added a second intro.
creator: Deprieved
